en_title: Gears of War Designer Cliff Bleszinski Reveals Struggle With Alcoholism, Discusses the Failure of LawBreakers and Potential Return to Video Game Development
cn_title: 《战争机器》设计师Cliff Bleszinski坦言酗酒拖垮工作室
subtitle: 戒酒后考虑回归

paragraphs.en: Video game developer Cliff Bleszinski has revealed his struggle with alcoholism and how it affected not just his work on Gears of War but contributed to the failure of hero shooter LawBreakers and his studio, Boss Key Productions.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏开发者Cliff Bleszinski披露了自己的酗酒问题，以及它如何不仅影响《战争机器》的开发，还促成了英雄射击游戏《LawBreakers》和其工作室Boss Key Productions的失败。

paragraphs.en: Bleszinski was one of the chief designers at Epic Games, working on Jazz Jackrabbit, the Unreal games, and Gears of War. He left Epic to found his own studio, Boss Key Productions, but its games, LawBreakers and Radical Heights, failed, and Boss Key shut down.
paragraphs.cn: Bleszinski曾是Epic Games的首席设计师之一，参与过《爵士兔》《虚幻》系列和《战争机器》。离开Epic后，他创办Boss Key Productions，但《LawBreakers》和《Radical Heights》均告失败，工作室最终关闭。

paragraphs.en: Now 51, Bleszinski told 80 Level that he’s mostly to blame for the collapse of Boss Key. "I was a functioning alcoholic," he said. "Then I became a non-functioning alcoholic." Bleszinski said he is now four months sober, and is considering a return to video game development.
paragraphs.cn: 现年51岁的Bleszinski告诉80 Level，Boss Key的倒闭主要应由自己负责。他说：「我曾是个还能正常工作的酒鬼，之后变成了无法正常工作的酒鬼。」他目前已戒酒四个月，并在考虑重返游戏开发。

paragraphs.en: The wide-ranging interview discusses everything from LawBreakers’ failure (“LawBreakers tripped so Concord could faceplant”), new game ideas that never came to anything, and the death of his dog. Bleszinski admitted his ego played a part in his various mistakes (he refused to co-found Boss Key with former fellow Gears developer Rod Fergusson, for example).
paragraphs.cn: 这场访谈话题广泛，从《LawBreakers》的失败（「《LawBreakers》先绊了一跤，才让《星鸣特攻》摔了个狗啃泥」），到未能成形的新游戏构想和爱犬去世。Bleszinski承认，自负也是他犯错的原因之一，例如他曾拒绝与前《战争机器》同事Rod Fergusson共同创办Boss Key。

paragraphs.en: Bleszinski said that his problems with alcohol began in 2003 while working on Unreal Tournament, but extended through the development of the Gears of War games,
paragraphs.cn: Bleszinski表示，他的饮酒问题始于2003年开发《虚幻竞技场》期间，并一路延续到《战争机器》系列的开发过程。

paragraphs.en: "The Gears of War trilogy was largely developed hungover by me," he said. "I was, at that point, a functioning alcoholic."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「《战争机器》三部曲很大程度上是在我宿醉的状态下开发出来的。那时，我还是个能正常工作的酒鬼。」

paragraphs.en: "You go to your GDCs, you go to your E3s, you have three nights in a row of going to parties, or wine dinner with your partners and then you have hotel lobby bars," he added. "My tolerance was so high that other developers would have a few and I would get all of this confidential information and remember it. It was almost like my superpower for a while."
paragraphs.cn: 他补充道：「你会去参加GDC、E3，连续三个晚上跑派对，或者和合作伙伴参加葡萄酒晚宴，之后还有酒店大堂酒吧。我的酒量高得离谱，其他开发者喝几杯后，我就能套出各种机密信息，而且还记得住。有一阵子，这几乎成了我的超能力。」

paragraphs.en: In March, Bleszinski suffered a seizure and ended up in hospital, he said. He gave up drinking after that, and is now seeing a therapist. "Eventually, my body was like 'F**k you,' and I realized this is me hitting a wall and it's time to give this up after 25 years of partying," he said.
paragraphs.cn: Bleszinski称，今年3月他癫痫发作并被送进医院。此后他戒了酒，也开始接受心理治疗。他说：「最终，我的身体像是在说『去你的』。我意识到自己撞墙了，狂欢25年后，是时候放弃酒精了。」

paragraphs.en: Now, though, Bleszinski appears to be doing better, telling 80 Level that he is considering a return to video game development. He made it clear, though, that he has no intention of making another PvP game, insisting: "Good luck to anyone in that space."
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Bleszinski如今似乎状态有所好转。他告诉80 Level，自己正在考虑重返游戏开发；但他明确表示无意再制作PvP游戏，并说道：「祝这个领域里的人好运。」

opus_summary: Cliff Bleszinski坦言，长达25年的酗酒影响了《战争机器》开发，也促成Boss Key及《LawBreakers》的失败。他在癫痫发作后戒酒四个月，如今正考虑重返游戏开发，但不会再做PvP游戏。
